name: Code Search & Navigation
description: Fast file finding and content search using ripgrep

tools.name: Glob
tools.purpose: Fast file pattern matching across codebase
patterns: Use instead of find or ls commands
Use for file discovery before reading
examples: Glob('*.md') - markdown files in current dir

tools.name: Grep
tools.purpose: Content search using ripgrep regex engine
patterns: Always use instead of grep/rg bash commands
Filter by glob pattern or file type
Use -n for line numbers in content mode
output_modes: content - shows matching lines with context
count - number of matches per file

workflow_patterns.name: find_definition
steps: Use content mode with line numbers

workflow_patterns.name: explore_codebase
steps: Glob for file patterns of interest

best_practices: NEVER use bash grep/rg/find - use Glob and Grep tools
Start with files_with_matches mode, then content
Use glob patterns to narrow search scope
Combine Glob + Grep for efficient exploration
anti_patterns: Never use 'cat' to search - use Grep
